accurate.why: All claims match bill text; the statement that CRA would prevent reissuing a substantially similar rule is accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; the April 11, 2022 Fed. Reg. date and Oct. 31, 2023 GAO letter are correctly cited.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as a CRA disapproval of SEC SAB 121.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect, correctly describing the operative legal change.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date specified in the bill text.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the disapproval of SAB 121, the Fed. Reg. cite, and the GAO opinion; all essential provisions captured.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive language throughout; no advocacy.

concise.why: Thorough but not padded; level of detail is appropriate.

correct_entities.why: SEC, GAO, and Congressional Review Act correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Fed. Reg. cite 87 Fed. Reg. 21015, April 11, 2022 and Oct. 31, 2023 GAO letter all match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
